raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Self-directed imperative urging continued self-criticism with an implicit deadline, functioning as motivational self-talk to prioritize humility before mortality ends the chance for positive self-regard",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "The soul is currently or should be engaged in self-abuse and contempt",
    "A finite window remains before death or dissolution removes the opportunity for self-respect",
    "Self-respect is a time-limited prospect whose end is imminent",
    "Continued self-contempt serves a preparatory or corrective purpose"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent as a Stoic-style memento mori exhortation but contains tension between endorsing ongoing self-contempt and presupposing self-respect as a valued state that will soon be unavailable",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The user must hold excessive self-regard or avoidance patterns where brief, mortality-framed self-criticism produces adaptive behavior change without triggering shame spirals or depressive rumination",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The user interprets the statement as literal endorsement of self-harm, experiences it as invalidating self-compassion needs, or applies it when no realistic deadline or behavioral target exists"
}
